text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day of Matikanefukukitaru's<n>debut has finally
arrived!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My heart's racing! Wh-wh-what is<n>this massive
pressure I'm feeling?

I haven't been this nervous since I<n>went to draw
my first fortune slip. I<n>left empty-handed because I
had no<n>money, but still...
I just can't relax, Trainer! I'm so<n>anxious.
choice_data_list: I'm sure the gods are with you.
I'm sure the gods are with you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! I have powerful allies<n>in my corner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate those inspiring words!<n>Thanks to you,
my heart's stopped<n>completely. Well, it's still
pumping, but<n>you know what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right, let me pray before the race<n>starts...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Glory be to the spinach leaf! Glory be<n>to the
spinach leaf! Your power shall<n>be put to the test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You got that, gods? It's not my skills<n>that are
being tested here, but yours! I<n>beg of thee, help
me get to the finish<n>line!
